recommendations.title: Dead Man Down
recommendations.overview: In New York City, a crime lord's right-hand man is seduced by a woman seeking retribution.

recommendations.title: The Rats: A Witcher Tale
recommendations.overview: To pull off a daring heist, a gang of six misfit outlaws will have to do something they've never done before: trust each other — and a washed-up Witcher.

recommendations.title: Stir Crazy
recommendations.overview: New Yorkers Skip Donahue and Harry Monroe have no jobs and no prospects, so they decide to flee the city and find work elsewhere, landing jobs wearing woodpecker costumes to promote the opening of a bank. When their feathery costumes are stolen and u

recommendations.title: Plastic
recommendations.overview: Sam and Fordy run a credit card fraud scheme, but when they steal from the wrong man, they find themselves threatened by sadistic gangster. They need to raise £5m and pull off a daring diamond heist to clear their debt.

recommendations.title: The Hurricane Heist
recommendations.overview: Thieves attempt a massive heist against the U.S. Treasury as a Category 5 hurricane approaches one of its Mint facilities.

recommendations.title: Money Plane
recommendations.overview: A professional thief with $40 million in debt and his family's life on the line must commit one final heist - rob a futuristic airborne casino filled with the world's most dangerous criminals.

recommendations.title: Swelter
recommendations.overview: Ten years after their casino heist, four escaped convicts trace their former partner to a desert town, where he is now a lawman with no memory of his criminal past.

recommendations.title: High Rollers
recommendations.overview: A master thief must pull off a dangerous casino heist when his nemesis kidnaps his lover. Caught between rival criminals and FBI pursuit, he risks all to save her and score big.

recommendations.title: How to Blow Up a Pipeline
recommendations.overview: A crew of young environmental activists execute a daring mission to sabotage an oil pipeline.

recommendations.title: Reindeer Games
recommendations.overview: After assuming his dead cellmate's identity to get with his girlfriend, an ex-con finds himself the reluctant participant in a casino heist.
